violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The door to the back employee's toilet room is not self-closing. Bathroom door shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The floor tiles in the back area are in poor repair. Floor tiles observed cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2026
